cap: A self-hosted platform that runs three tiers of agent work — repo Tasks (ticket → isolated env → agent → PR → CI monitor → auto-fix → merge), standalone Jobs, and long-lived named Agents — over a shared trigger/template/log-streaming API.

Claude Code custom slash-command + subagent set implementing a 5-stage PRD→research→plan→review→testcase pipeline, combining Producer-Reviewer (generator + critic subagents) and Fan-out/Fan-in (parallel research/review) multi-agent patterns
A town simulation where LLM-driven NPC agents form memories, reflect, and plan, producing emergent social behavior in a game-like sandbox.
MCP server that queries China Railway's 12306 ticketing system for train search, transfer routing, and station filtering, exposed as callable tools to an LLM.

A minimal, unambiguous programming language with a formally-verified (Coq) core, a C transpiler, and a sandboxing VM (NanoISA) that isolates dangerous external calls.
An MCP server bundling static 2026 World Cup data (matches, teams, venues, odds, visas, fan zones) and exposing 18 query tools with timezone conversion, no external API calls required.

An F# authoring layer over Microsoft's Agent Framework that provides a computation-expression DSL for typed, composable agent workflows (fan-out/fan-in, tryStep railway-oriented error handling) with both in-process and durable checkpoint/resume execution.

A Kubernetes AIOps agent that investigates alerts via client-go, Prometheus, and logs, selects a remediation from a workflow catalog, executes or escalates with RCA, and supports interactive human takeover via MCP/A2A.

A Python CLI coding agent that talks to the Cerebras inference API, generates/applies file diffs with a numbered checkpoint/revert history, and answers repo questions without making changes.

an MCP memory server (self-hosted Redis or managed SaaS) that stores/retrieves decisions and knowledge across Claude sessions, with auto-consolidation, workspace modes, and a companion Claude-Code plugin (context-loader, task-decomposer commands)

A zero-dependency Go webhook-triggered agent that queues messages FIFO per channel, runs a bounded tool-call loop (file I/O, grep, glob, fetch, bash, view-image) in a path-traversal-guarded sandbox, persists session state as flat JSON with context-aware summarization, and drains pending work to disk on shutdown.
A Windows service that watches a folder for Epicor CAB files and installs them across configured Epicor ERP environments, emailing logs on completion.

Deterministic, capability-allowlist MCP policy engine (Rust) that evaluates tool calls against JSON-schema/annotation rules with a hash-chained audit log, benchmarked against adversarial prompt-injection corpora and an LLM-as-judge baseline.

Go microservice owning newsletter draft/sent state and recipient resolution for the LFX platform, deployed via Helm/CloudNativePG, with a GitHub Actions pipeline that runs an AI 'conductor' to triage PRs and an 'escalation-reviewer' to gate risky changes to a human.

Fast local VM orchestrator (QEMU/KVM linked clones) with a CLI/TUI and an MCP server exposing compact vm/template/image/blueprint tools so AI agents can spawn, use, and destroy real (non-container) VMs as sandboxes.

coordinator-plus-specialist-agent system (YAML-defined agents, TypeScript skill handlers) that handles email/scheduling/research for a CEO, enforcing layer separation (channel adapters cannot call tools directly), append-only audit logging, and a knowledge-graph/entity-memory store with temporal decay.

A minimal weather agent exposing two tools (geocode, current-weather) over the A2A JSON-RPC protocol via Starlette, with per-context session state and human-in-the-loop approval gating on the weather tool using A2A's input-required task state.

An AutoGen-based team of LLM agents (agent builder, team manager, tool router) that routes user input to a dynamically-selected agent team to produce sales/marketing strategies and client profiles, with plugin tools (yfinance, websearch/RAG).

A local-first terminal coding agent (Python) with real LSP + DAP integration for code intelligence and debugging, plan/execute/validate/finish workflow, and a headless smoke-test harness with an LLM stub for CI regression testing.

A Claude Code plugin that shells out to the Qwen Code CLI to delegate rescue/investigation/code-review subtasks, exposing slash commands (/rescue, /review, /adversarial-review) and a stop-review-gate hook, with job tracking and process management.
